description: FILE-LEVEL TEST: Runs ALL tests inside employerLogin.spec.ts. Tests included: TC1 - Valid login redirects to dashboard, TC3 - Sign-in is not clickable when email and password are empty, TC4 - Success message is shown and OTP is requested when valid email is submitted, TC5 - Displays user doesnt exist when unregistered email is entered, TC6 - Send sign-in code button is disabled when email field is empty, TC7 - Employer is redirected to forgot password page when clicking Forgot password link.
